activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception not activated
Consignor allowed if consignor found anywhere in invoice
Allowed abbreviation of legal company form
Consignee prioritization: invoice to/bill to first
At least one quantity must be matched

consignor.motivation: Consignor "Forest Papper AB" in certificate matches invoice issuer "FOREST PAPER AB" considering allowed abbreviation difference in legal form and typical character OCR minor errors. The consignor name was found in invoice header and company VAT details, no mismatching land information (Sweden). Normalization rules applied per 4.1.3.6.

consignee.motivation: Consignee name in certificate matches invoice "Buyer" and "Delivery address" with identical full name and address in Turkey. Company name normalised identically; match confirmed with direct textual equality.

goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate "Fluting- Testliner" exactly appears in invoice product description. No article numbers present, thus text matching was applied with allowed normalization. Description matches explicitly.

quantity.motivation: Quantity 46740 kgs in certificate matches invoice total quantity of 46,74 MT after conversion using 1 MT = 1000 KG. Units and numeric precision confirmed equivalent within tolerance. Weight category assumed consistent; certificate indicates total quantity with units.

origin.motivation: Origin country "United Kingdom" is explicitly stated in both certificate (box 3) and invoice (goods origin). Normalization rules applied; both documents match exactly on origin.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points matched exactly or after allowed normalization without contradictions or missing data. Certificate of Origin can be automatically approved against the attached invoice.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontroller stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell granskning.
